_doc: Merged input + output contract for Brand Resolver phase. Validated against live code 2026-03-23.

call_shape.config: object — consumed for LLM routing (hasLlmRouteApiKey, llmTimeoutMs)
call_shape.logger: object|null — used for LLM error logging (brand_resolver_llm_error)

registry_settings_consumed._note: No brand-resolver-specific registry settings. Confidence is LLM-derived via parseConfidence(). Crawl config for brand promotions is now a static shape: { method: 'http', robots_txt_compliant: true } — no rate_limit_ms or timeout_ms. The former registry settings manufacturerCrawlRateLimitMs and manufacturerCrawlTimeoutMs were deleted on 2026-03-23.

storage_contract.write: storage.upsertBrandDomain({ brand, category, official_domain, aliases, support_domain, confidence })
storage_contract._jsdoc: BrandDomainRow typedef: { brand, category, official_domain, aliases, support_domain, confidence }

call_shape.logger: object|null — passed through to resolveBrandDomainFn and used for event emission

stage_wrapper.di_seam_note: resolveBrandDomainFn now receives logger as a parameter alongside brand, category, config, callLlmFn, storage

caller_gates: runDiscoverySeedPlan() only attempts resolution when a brand is present in job
runBrandResolver() only creates callLlmFn when hasLlmRouteApiKey(config, { role: 'triage' }) is true
resolveBrandDomainFn receives logger so LLM errors are logged as brand_resolver_llm_error

promotion_inputs._note: Promotion logic is inline in runDiscoverySeedPlan.js, not a separate module.
promotion_inputs.inline_logic: Normalizes officialDomain, builds host entry with crawlConfig { method: 'http', robots_txt_compliant: true }, pushes to categoryConfig.sourceHosts/sourceHostMap/approvedRootDomains
promotion_inputs.manufacturer_source_note: Brand Resolver is the SOLE source of manufacturer domain data. sources.json approved.manufacturer arrays are empty for all categories.

function_return.confidence: number (0-1, LLM-derived via parseConfidence()) or null

confidence_behavior: cache hit: parseConfidence(cached.confidence) — stored value, clamped 0-1, null if missing
LLM success with officialDomain: parseConfidence(result?.confidence) — LLM-provided
LLM success without officialDomain: null (no resolution = no confidence)
empty brand / no callLlmFn / LLM error: null
confidence IS model-derived — parseConfidence() clamps to 0-1 (values >1 divided by 100)
caller_statuses: resolved_empty — LLM was available but returned no officialDomain

stage_wrapper_return.brandResolution: object|null — the resolveBrandDomain() result or null
stage_wrapper_return._note: Orchestrator applies brand promotion inline — checks brandResolution.officialDomain and adds to categoryConfig.sourceHosts/sourceHostMap/approvedRootDomains directly.

brand_resolved_event_shape._note: candidates field removed — no longer emitted

caller_side_effects: brand_resolved logger event emitted by phase wrapper
orchestrator applies brand promotion inline to categoryConfig after phase completes

logic: Builds a manufacturer host entry inline: { host, tierName: 'manufacturer', sourceId: 'brand_<host>', displayName, crawlConfig, fieldCoverage: null, robotsTxtCompliant: true, baseUrl }
Adds entry to categoryConfig.sourceHosts and sourceHostMap (if not already present)

output.artifact_note: There is no dedicated brand_resolver.json artifact in the live runtime.
